title: 10 best herbal creams for gum infection
description: Sweet marjoram creams helps with gum infection because of its potent antimicrobial properties. The herb's essential oils, such as thymol and linalool, have been shown to inhibit the growth of bacteria that cause gum infections, reducing inflammation and pain in the affected area. Additionally, marjoram's anti-inflammatory compounds help reduce swelling and ease discomfort, promoting healing and soothing gums. As a result, sweet marjoram creams can provide natural relief from gum infect...
